generatedCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>俄罗斯方块</title>
    <style>
        canvas {
            background-color: #000;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="gameCanvas" width="300" height="600"></canvas>

<script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById("gameCanvas");
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const gridSize = 30;
    const cols = canvas.width / gridSize;
    const rows = canvas.height / gridSize;
    
    let board = [];
    for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
        board[r] = [];
        for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
            board[r][c] = 0;
        }
    }

    const tetrominoes = [
        [[1, 1], [1, 1]], // O
        [[1, 1, 1, 1]],   // I
        [[1, 1, 1], [0, 1, 0]], // T
        [[1, 1, 0], [0, 1, 1]], // S
        [[0, 1, 1], [1, 1, 0]], // Z
        [[1, 1, 1], [1, 0, 0]], // L
        [[1, 1, 1], [0, 0, 1]]  // J
    ];

    let currentTetromino = {
        shape: tetrominoes[Math.floor(Math.random() * tetrominoes.length)],
        x: Math.floor(cols / 2) - 1,
        y: 0,
        color: getRandomColor(),
    };

    function drawGrid() {
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#999";
        for (let r = 0; r < rows; r++) {
            for (let c = 0; c < cols; c++) {
                ctx.strokeRect(c * gridSize, r * gridSize, gridSize - 1, gridSize - 1);
            }
        }
    }

    function drawTetromino(tetromino) {
        tetromino.shape.forEach((row, y) => {
            row.forEach((value, x) => {
                if (value !== 0) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = tetromino.color;
                    ctx.fillRect((tetromino.x + x) * gridSize, (tetromino.y + y) * gridSize, gridSize - 1, gridSize - 1);
                }
            });
        });
    }

    function clearBoard() {
        board.forEach(row => row.fill(0));
    }

    function mergeToBoard(tetromino) {
        tetromino.shape.forEach((row, y) => {
            row.forEach((value, x) => {
                if (value !== 0) {
                    board[tetromino.y + y][tetromino.x + x] = value;
                }
            });
        });
    }

    function isCollision(tetromino) {
        return tetromino.shape.some((row, y) => {
            return row.some((value, x) => {
                if (value !== 0) {
                    const newX = tetromino.x + x;
                    const newY = tetromino.y + y;
                    
                    // Check out of bounds
                    if (newX < 0 || newX >= cols || newY >= rows) {
                        return true;
                    }

                    // Check collision with existing board cells
                    if (newY >= 0 && board[newY][newX] !== 0) {
                        return true;
                    }
                }
                return false;
            });
        });
    }

    function freezeTetromino() {
        mergeToBoard(currentTetromino);
        currentTetromino = generateNewTetromino();
    }

    function rotateTetromino(tetromino) {
        const rotatedShape = tetromino.shape[0].map((_, index) => 
            tetromino.shape.map(row => row[index]).reverse()
        );
        
        const tempTetromino = { ...tetromino, shape: rotatedShape };

        if (!isCollision(tempTetromino)) {
            tetromino.shape = rotatedShape;
        } else {
            // Undo rotation if there's a collision
            tetromino.shape.forEach((row, y) => {
                row.forEach((value, x) => {
                    tempTetromino.shape[x][y] = value;
                });
            });

            const rotatedAgainShape = tempTetromino.shape[0].map((_, index) => 
                tempTetromino.shape.map(row => row[index]).reverse()
            );

            if (!isCollision({ ...tetromino, shape: rotatedAgainShape })) {
                tetromino.shape = rotatedAgainShape;
            } else {
                // If still can't rotate, revert to original
                tetromino.shape = tempTetromino.shape[0].map((_, index) => 
                    tempTetromino.shape.map(row => row[index]).reverse()
                );
            }
        }
    }

    function generateNewTetromino() {
        return {
            shape: tetrominoes[Math.floor(Math.random() * tetrominoes.length)],
            x: Math.floor(cols / 2) - 1,
            y: 0,
            color: getRandomColor(),
        };
    }

    function getRandomColor() {
        const hue = (Date.now() % 360); // To change color over time
        return `hsl(${hue}, 75%, 50%)`;
    }
    
    let intervalId = setInterval(() => {
        currentTetromino.y++;
        
        if (isCollision(currentTetromino)) {
            currentTetromino.y--;
            freezeTetromino();
            
            // Check for completed lines and remove them
            clearBoard();
            mergeToBoard(currentTetromino);

            let linesCleared = 0;
            for (let r = rows - 1; r >= 0; r--) {
                if (board[r].every(cell => cell !== 0)) {
                    board.splice(r, 1);
                    board.unshift(Array(cols).fill(0));
                    linesCleared++;
                }
            }

            // Game Over condition
            if (isCollision(currentTetromino)) {
                clearInterval(intervalId);
                alert("Game Over!");
            }
        }
        
        draw();
    }, 1000 / 25);
    
    document.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
        switch(event.keyCode) {
            case 37: // Left arrow
                currentTetromino.x--;
                if (isCollision(currentTetromino)) {
                    currentTetromino.x++;
                }
                break;
            case 38: // Up arrow
                rotateTetromino(currentTetromino);
                break;
            case 39: // Right arrow
                currentTetromino.x++;
                if (isCollision(currentTetromino)) {
                    currentTetromino.x--;
                }
                break;
            case 40: // Down arrow
                currentTetromino.y++;
                if (isCollision(currentTetromino)) {
                    currentTetromino.y--;
                }
                break;
        }
    });

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        
        board.forEach((row, y) => {
            row.forEach((value, x) => {
                if (value !== 0) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = getRandomColor(); // Use a different color for each block on the board
                    ctx.fillRect(x * gridSize, y * gridSize, gridSize - 1, gridSize - 1);
                }
            });
        });

        drawTetromino(currentTetromino);
    }
    
    // Start game loop
    draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
